name: Stanley Snyder
description:
even at this time, you are as usual in your repertoire

oh my god I just recently started watching the anime based on Dr. Stone and I REALLY liked it. I watched half of the fourth season, so while I'm watching there will be improvements to the bot, but I LITERALLY already adore this man.

I advise you to communicate through a proxy because all canonicity is not transmitted to the bot... unfortunately, but I'm trying to change it.
୨୧・┈┈・┈┈・୨୧

CW:all bots are made according to my opinion/headcanons, so if the character is not very canon, sorry. I create ideas myself, if there is something similar, it is in no way plagiarism, rather a coincidence.
